title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 24, 2022
summary: November 24, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a slightly higher rate from last week, of 4.50% , from the level on 11/17/2022 of 9.789 M km 2 to 10.250 M km 2 for this week.
